pr.title: Added Vercel deployment
pr.body:
<!-- Keep this PR as draft until it is ready for review. -->

<!-- AI/LLM agents: be concise and specific. Do not check the box below. -->

- [x] A human has tested these changes.

---

## Why
Users without a pc can still deploy it 
<!-- Describe problem, motivation, etc.-->

## Summary

Added a Vercel deployment config at frontend/vercel.json with:
npm run build build command,
static output directory set to build/client,
a catch-all SPA rewrite to /index.html so deep links and refreshes work correctly on Vercel-hosted frontend routes.
Added a new “Deploying the Frontend on Vercel” section in frontend/README.md that explains root directory setup, required env vars, and the backend requirement for a working deployment.

<!-- 1-3 bullets describing what changed. -->
-
